title: 4 Pack SuperGlue - 3g Fastest & Toughest Adhesive Instant Repair Super Glue All Purpose - Strong Super glue for Hard Plastic, Rubber, Metal, Leather, Ceramics, Wood, DIY Craft & as Shoe Glue
features: Instant Bonding, Long-Lasting Hold : This Super glue all purpose dries in only 10 seconds. Our quick-fix super glue dries and sticks right away, saving time and money. No need for clamps, it dries and bonds instantly.

User-Friendly: Our Premium-Quality Superglue gel airtight tubes are easy to open, preventing the glue from drying out unexpectedly. Plus, the pinpoint nozzle on our glue packing ensures a clean and quick application, reducing messy spills.

Super Glue all purpose: GMSA super strong adhesive works wonders on a variety of materials, making it perfect to be used as ceramic repairs in Wood, pottery, jewellery, plastic, rubber, paper & it's perfect to be used as leather glue, metal glue & shoe glue and much more, ensuring lasting results.

Maximum Strength, Minimum Cost : Our strong super glue for wood and shoes is made from strong stuff called cyanoacrylate. It makes tough bonds that last a long time on many surfaces. Perfect for everyday projects indoors, outdoors, in the office, or workshop, ensuring reliability that makes it Strong glue wherever you need it.
No Waste, No Hassle: Say goodbye to dried-out glue with our convenient tube featuring an easy-to-open design with Anti-Clog Cap & self-piercing nozzle.
